meaning: n.[化]电合成(指由电流引起的合成反应)
examples: Paired electrosynthesis using glyoxylic acid as a model product has been studied in this paper.
In this paper, a new method for synthesizing double aldehyde starch (DAS), the indirect electrosynthesis, was advanced.
The characteristics of the paired electrosynthesis and the paired electrolysis of glucose were comprehensively reviewed.
